condition.description: Defines an IAM condition to apply constraints on the IAM policy binding, specifying when and how the binding should be enforced.

instance.description: Specifies the Bigtable instance for which IAM roles will be managed.

member.description: Specifies the identity to which the IAM policy binding applies, such as a user, service account, or group.

role.description: Defines the IAM role to be assigned to the member for managing permissions in the Bigtable instance.
